signals.headline: Trump Announces Intention to Nominate Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Replacing Powell in May | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Intention to Nominate Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Replacing Powell in May | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced on January 31, 2026, his plan to nominate Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair when Powell's term ends in May 2026, sparking immediate debate on Fed policy shifts, independence, and rate cuts[1][2][3][4][6].
